name: I'm Turning Into A Vampire
overview: "I'm Turning into a Vampire" is one of the many stories and also a limited series released by My Story Animated. The first season was published on YouTube in February 2024 and the first and second episodes of the second season was published on September 6th and 27th, 2024.

trailers.title: I'm Turning Into A Vampire - Youtube TV Show -  trailer
